title: elaeocarpus ferruginiflorus
intro: Elaeocarpus ferruginiflorus, also known as the red-flowered Elaeocarpus, is a plant species in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus ferruginiflorus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from wounds and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
